options.content: Grafana é uma ferramenta administrativa/local neste projeto. Ele não herda permissões do Django. Usuários comuns devem acompanhar seus próprios indicadores pelo dashboard interno do Checklist, que aplica as permissões da aplicação.

targets.rawSql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::date AS start_date,
    ($__timeTo()::timestamp - interval '1 second')::date AS end_date
),
period AS (
  SELECT
    start_date,
    end_date,
    GREATEST((end_date - start_date + 1), 1)::numeric AS days
  FROM params
),
operator_counts AS (
  SELECT
    up.position_id,
    COUNT(*)::numeric AS operator_count
  FROM checklists_userprofile up
  JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR'
    AND up.active = TRUE
    AND au.is_active = TRUE
  GROUP BY up.position_id
),
metric_scope AS (
  SELECT
    p.id AS position_id,
    p.name AS position_name,
    mt.id AS metric_id,
    mt.area,
    mt.name AS metric_name,
    COALESCE(tt.title, '-') AS activity_title,
    mt.unit,
    mt.frequency,
    CASE mt.frequency
      WHEN 'DAILY' THEN 'Diário'
      WHEN 'WEEKLY' THEN 'Semanal'
      WHEN 'MONTHLY' THEN 'Mensal'
      WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN 'Anual'
      ELSE mt.frequency
    END AS frequency_label,
    ROUND((
      CASE mt.frequency
        WHEN 'DAILY' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days
        WHEN 'WEEKLY' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days / 7.0
        WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days / 365.25
        ELSE mt.monthly_target * (
          CASE
            WHEN date_trunc('month', per.start_date)::date = date_trunc('month', per.end_date)::date THEN
              per.days / EXTRACT(day FROM (date_trunc('month', per.start_date)::date + interval '1 month - 1 day'))::numeric
            ELSE
              EXTRACT(year FROM age(date_trunc('month', per.end_date), date_trunc('month', per.start_date))) * 12
              + EXTRACT(month FROM age(date_trunc('month', per.end_date), date_trunc('month', per.start_date)))
              + 1
          END
        )
      END
    )::numeric, 2) AS target_per_user
  FROM checklists_position p
  JOIN checklists_metrictype mt ON mt.position_id = p.id OR mt.position_id IS NULL
  LEFT JOIN checklists_tasktemplate tt ON tt.id = mt.activity_id
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE p.active = TRUE
    AND mt.active = TRUE
    AND p.id::text LIKE '$position'
),
records_by_metric AS (
  SELECT
    mr.position_id,
    mr.metric_id,
    SUM(mr.value)::numeric AS value
  FROM checklists_metricrecord mr
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE mr.date BETWEEN per.start_date AND per.end_date
  GROUP BY mr.position_id, mr.metric_id
),
profiles AS (
  SELECT
    up.position_id,
    up.user_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(up.display_name, ''), au.username) AS user_name
  FROM checklists_userprofile up
  JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR'
    AND up.active = TRUE
    AND au.is_active = TRUE
    AND up.position_id::text LIKE '$position'
    AND up.user_id::text LIKE '$user'
),
records_by_user AS (
  SELECT
    mr.position_id,
    mr.metric_id,
    mr.created_by_id AS user_id,
    SUM(mr.value)::numeric AS value
  FROM checklists_metricrecord mr
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE mr.date BETWEEN per.start_date AND per.end_date
    AND COALESCE(mr.created_by_id::text, '') LIKE '$user'
  GROUP BY mr.position_id, mr.metric_id, mr.created_by_id
)SELECT
  'Total geral' AS totalizador,
  ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rbm.value, 0))::numeric, 2) AS realizado,
  ROUND(SUM(ms.target_per_user * GREATEST(COALESCE(oc.operator_count, 0), 1))::numeric, 2) AS meta,
  ROUND((
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(ms.target_per_user * GREATEST(COALESCE(oc.operator_count, 0), 1)) > 0 THEN
        SUM(COALESCE(rbm.value, 0)) / SUM(ms.target_per_user * GREATEST(COALESCE(oc.operator_count, 0), 1)) * 100
      ELSE NULL
    END
  )::numeric, 1) AS percentual
FROM metric_scope ms
LEFT JOIN records_by_metric rbm ON rbm.position_id = ms.position_id AND rbm.metric_id = ms.metric_id
LEFT JOIN operator_counts oc ON oc.position_id = ms.position_id;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::date AS start_date,
    ($__timeTo()::timestamp - interval '1 second')::date AS end_date
),
period AS (
  SELECT
    start_date,
    end_date,
    GREATEST((end_date - start_date + 1), 1)::numeric AS days
  FROM params
),
operator_counts AS (
  SELECT
    up.position_id,
    COUNT(*)::numeric AS operator_count
  FROM checklists_userprofile up
  JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR'
    AND up.active = TRUE
    AND au.is_active = TRUE
  GROUP BY up.position_id
),
metric_scope AS (
  SELECT
    p.id AS position_id,
    p.name AS position_name,
    mt.id AS metric_id,
    mt.area,
    mt.name AS metric_name,
    COALESCE(tt.title, '-') AS activity_title,
    mt.unit,
    mt.frequency,
    CASE mt.frequency
      WHEN 'DAILY' THEN 'Diário'
      WHEN 'WEEKLY' THEN 'Semanal'
      WHEN 'MONTHLY' THEN 'Mensal'
      WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN 'Anual'
      ELSE mt.frequency
    END AS frequency_label,
    ROUND((
      CASE mt.frequency
        WHEN 'DAILY' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days
        WHEN 'WEEKLY' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days / 7.0
        WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days / 365.25
        ELSE mt.monthly_target * (
          CASE
            WHEN date_trunc('month', per.start_date)::date = date_trunc('month', per.end_date)::date THEN
              per.days / EXTRACT(day FROM (date_trunc('month', per.start_date)::date + interval '1 month - 1 day'))::numeric
            ELSE
              EXTRACT(year FROM age(date_trunc('month', per.end_date), date_trunc('month', per.start_date))) * 12
              + EXTRACT(month FROM age(date_trunc('month', per.end_date), date_trunc('month', per.start_date)))
              + 1
          END
        )
      END
    )::numeric, 2) AS target_per_user
  FROM checklists_position p
  JOIN checklists_metrictype mt ON mt.position_id = p.id OR mt.position_id IS NULL
  LEFT JOIN checklists_tasktemplate tt ON tt.id = mt.activity_id
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE p.active = TRUE
    AND mt.active = TRUE
    AND p.id::text LIKE '$position'
),
records_by_metric AS (
  SELECT
    mr.position_id,
    mr.metric_id,
    SUM(mr.value)::numeric AS value
  FROM checklists_metricrecord mr
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE mr.date BETWEEN per.start_date AND per.end_date
  GROUP BY mr.position_id, mr.metric_id
),
profiles AS (
  SELECT
    up.position_id,
    up.user_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(up.display_name, ''), au.username) AS user_name
  FROM checklists_userprofile up
  JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR'
    AND up.active = TRUE
    AND au.is_active = TRUE
    AND up.position_id::text LIKE '$position'
    AND up.user_id::text LIKE '$user'
),
records_by_user AS (
  SELECT
    mr.position_id,
    mr.metric_id,
    mr.created_by_id AS user_id,
    SUM(mr.value)::numeric AS value
  FROM checklists_metricrecord mr
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE mr.date BETWEEN per.start_date AND per.end_date
    AND COALESCE(mr.created_by_id::text, '') LIKE '$user'
  GROUP BY mr.position_id, mr.metric_id, mr.created_by_id
)SELECT
  ms.position_name AS "Tipo/cargo",
  ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rbm.value, 0))::numeric, 2) AS "Realizado",
  ROUND(SUM(ms.target_per_user * GREATEST(COALESCE(oc.operator_count, 0), 1))::numeric, 2) AS "Meta",
  ROUND((
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(ms.target_per_user * GREATEST(COALESCE(oc.operator_count, 0), 1)) > 0 THEN
        SUM(COALESCE(rbm.value, 0)) / SUM(ms.target_per_user * GREATEST(COALESCE(oc.operator_count, 0), 1)) * 100
      ELSE NULL
    END
  )::numeric, 1) AS "% atingimento"
FROM metric_scope ms
LEFT JOIN records_by_metric rbm ON rbm.position_id = ms.position_id AND rbm.metric_id = ms.metric_id
LEFT JOIN operator_counts oc ON oc.position_id = ms.position_id
GROUP BY ms.position_name
ORDER BY ms.position_name;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::date AS start_date,
    ($__timeTo()::timestamp - interval '1 second')::date AS end_date
),
period AS (
  SELECT
    start_date,
    end_date,
    GREATEST((end_date - start_date + 1), 1)::numeric AS days
  FROM params
),
operator_counts AS (
  SELECT
    up.position_id,
    COUNT(*)::numeric AS operator_count
  FROM checklists_userprofile up
  JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR'
    AND up.active = TRUE
    AND au.is_active = TRUE
  GROUP BY up.position_id
),
metric_scope AS (
  SELECT
    p.id AS position_id,
    p.name AS position_name,
    mt.id AS metric_id,
    mt.area,
    mt.name AS metric_name,
    COALESCE(tt.title, '-') AS activity_title,
    mt.unit,
    mt.frequency,
    CASE mt.frequency
      WHEN 'DAILY' THEN 'Diário'
      WHEN 'WEEKLY' THEN 'Semanal'
      WHEN 'MONTHLY' THEN 'Mensal'
      WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN 'Anual'
      ELSE mt.frequency
    END AS frequency_label,
    ROUND((
      CASE mt.frequency
        WHEN 'DAILY' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days
        WHEN 'WEEKLY' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days / 7.0
        WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days / 365.25
        ELSE mt.monthly_target * (
          CASE
            WHEN date_trunc('month', per.start_date)::date = date_trunc('month', per.end_date)::date THEN
              per.days / EXTRACT(day FROM (date_trunc('month', per.start_date)::date + interval '1 month - 1 day'))::numeric
            ELSE
              EXTRACT(year FROM age(date_trunc('month', per.end_date), date_trunc('month', per.start_date))) * 12
              + EXTRACT(month FROM age(date_trunc('month', per.end_date), date_trunc('month', per.start_date)))
              + 1
          END
        )
      END
    )::numeric, 2) AS target_per_user
  FROM checklists_position p
  JOIN checklists_metrictype mt ON mt.position_id = p.id OR mt.position_id IS NULL
  LEFT JOIN checklists_tasktemplate tt ON tt.id = mt.activity_id
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE p.active = TRUE
    AND mt.active = TRUE
    AND p.id::text LIKE '$position'
),
records_by_metric AS (
  SELECT
    mr.position_id,
    mr.metric_id,
    SUM(mr.value)::numeric AS value
  FROM checklists_metricrecord mr
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE mr.date BETWEEN per.start_date AND per.end_date
  GROUP BY mr.position_id, mr.metric_id
),
profiles AS (
  SELECT
    up.position_id,
    up.user_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(up.display_name, ''), au.username) AS user_name
  FROM checklists_userprofile up
  JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR'
    AND up.active = TRUE
    AND au.is_active = TRUE
    AND up.position_id::text LIKE '$position'
    AND up.user_id::text LIKE '$user'
),
records_by_user AS (
  SELECT
    mr.position_id,
    mr.metric_id,
    mr.created_by_id AS user_id,
    SUM(mr.value)::numeric AS value
  FROM checklists_metricrecord mr
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE mr.date BETWEEN per.start_date AND per.end_date
    AND COALESCE(mr.created_by_id::text, '') LIKE '$user'
  GROUP BY mr.position_id, mr.metric_id, mr.created_by_id
)SELECT
  pr.user_name AS "Usuário",
  ROUND((
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(ms.target_per_user) > 0 THEN SUM(COALESCE(rbu.value, 0)) / SUM(ms.target_per_user) * 100
      ELSE NULL
    END
  )::numeric, 1) AS "% atingimento"
FROM metric_scope ms
JOIN profiles pr ON pr.position_id = ms.position_id
LEFT JOIN records_by_user rbu ON rbu.position_id = ms.position_id AND rbu.metric_id = ms.metric_id AND rbu.user_id = pr.user_id
GROUP BY pr.user_name
ORDER BY pr.user_name;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::date AS start_date,
    ($__timeTo()::timestamp - interval '1 second')::date AS end_date
),
period AS (
  SELECT
    start_date,
    end_date,
    GREATEST((end_date - start_date + 1), 1)::numeric AS days
  FROM params
),
operator_counts AS (
  SELECT
    up.position_id,
    COUNT(*)::numeric AS operator_count
  FROM checklists_userprofile up
  JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR'
    AND up.active = TRUE
    AND au.is_active = TRUE
  GROUP BY up.position_id
),
metric_scope AS (
  SELECT
    p.id AS position_id,
    p.name AS position_name,
    mt.id AS metric_id,
    mt.area,
    mt.name AS metric_name,
    COALESCE(tt.title, '-') AS activity_title,
    mt.unit,
    mt.frequency,
    CASE mt.frequency
      WHEN 'DAILY' THEN 'Diário'
      WHEN 'WEEKLY' THEN 'Semanal'
      WHEN 'MONTHLY' THEN 'Mensal'
      WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN 'Anual'
      ELSE mt.frequency
    END AS frequency_label,
    ROUND((
      CASE mt.frequency
        WHEN 'DAILY' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days
        WHEN 'WEEKLY' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days / 7.0
        WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days / 365.25
        ELSE mt.monthly_target * (
          CASE
            WHEN date_trunc('month', per.start_date)::date = date_trunc('month', per.end_date)::date THEN
              per.days / EXTRACT(day FROM (date_trunc('month', per.start_date)::date + interval '1 month - 1 day'))::numeric
            ELSE
              EXTRACT(year FROM age(date_trunc('month', per.end_date), date_trunc('month', per.start_date))) * 12
              + EXTRACT(month FROM age(date_trunc('month', per.end_date), date_trunc('month', per.start_date)))
              + 1
          END
        )
      END
    )::numeric, 2) AS target_per_user
  FROM checklists_position p
  JOIN checklists_metrictype mt ON mt.position_id = p.id OR mt.position_id IS NULL
  LEFT JOIN checklists_tasktemplate tt ON tt.id = mt.activity_id
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE p.active = TRUE
    AND mt.active = TRUE
    AND p.id::text LIKE '$position'
),
records_by_metric AS (
  SELECT
    mr.position_id,
    mr.metric_id,
    SUM(mr.value)::numeric AS value
  FROM checklists_metricrecord mr
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE mr.date BETWEEN per.start_date AND per.end_date
  GROUP BY mr.position_id, mr.metric_id
),
profiles AS (
  SELECT
    up.position_id,
    up.user_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(up.display_name, ''), au.username) AS user_name
  FROM checklists_userprofile up
  JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR'
    AND up.active = TRUE
    AND au.is_active = TRUE
    AND up.position_id::text LIKE '$position'
    AND up.user_id::text LIKE '$user'
),
records_by_user AS (
  SELECT
    mr.position_id,
    mr.metric_id,
    mr.created_by_id AS user_id,
    SUM(mr.value)::numeric AS value
  FROM checklists_metricrecord mr
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE mr.date BETWEEN per.start_date AND per.end_date
    AND COALESCE(mr.created_by_id::text, '') LIKE '$user'
  GROUP BY mr.position_id, mr.metric_id, mr.created_by_id
)SELECT
  ms.position_name AS "Tipo/cargo",
  ms.area AS "Área",
  ms.metric_name AS "Indicador",
  ms.activity_title AS "Atividade",
  ms.frequency_label AS "Frequência",
  ROUND(COALESCE(rbm.value, 0)::numeric, 2) AS "Realizado",
  ROUND((ms.target_per_user * GREATEST(COALESCE(oc.operator_count, 0), 1))::numeric, 2) AS "Meta",
  ms.unit AS "Unidade",
  ROUND((
    CASE
      WHEN (ms.target_per_user * GREATEST(COALESCE(oc.operator_count, 0), 1)) > 0 THEN
        COALESCE(rbm.value, 0) / (ms.target_per_user * GREATEST(COALESCE(oc.operator_count, 0), 1)) * 100
      ELSE NULL
    END
  )::numeric, 1) AS "% atingimento"
FROM metric_scope ms
LEFT JOIN records_by_metric rbm ON rbm.position_id = ms.position_id AND rbm.metric_id = ms.metric_id
LEFT JOIN operator_counts oc ON oc.position_id = ms.position_id
ORDER BY ms.position_name, ms.area, ms.metric_name;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::date AS start_date,
    ($__timeTo()::timestamp - interval '1 second')::date AS end_date
),
period AS (
  SELECT
    start_date,
    end_date,
    GREATEST((end_date - start_date + 1), 1)::numeric AS days
  FROM params
),
operator_counts AS (
  SELECT
    up.position_id,
    COUNT(*)::numeric AS operator_count
  FROM checklists_userprofile up
  JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR'
    AND up.active = TRUE
    AND au.is_active = TRUE
  GROUP BY up.position_id
),
metric_scope AS (
  SELECT
    p.id AS position_id,
    p.name AS position_name,
    mt.id AS metric_id,
    mt.area,
    mt.name AS metric_name,
    COALESCE(tt.title, '-') AS activity_title,
    mt.unit,
    mt.frequency,
    CASE mt.frequency
      WHEN 'DAILY' THEN 'Diário'
      WHEN 'WEEKLY' THEN 'Semanal'
      WHEN 'MONTHLY' THEN 'Mensal'
      WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN 'Anual'
      ELSE mt.frequency
    END AS frequency_label,
    ROUND((
      CASE mt.frequency
        WHEN 'DAILY' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days
        WHEN 'WEEKLY' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days / 7.0
        WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN mt.monthly_target * per.days / 365.25
        ELSE mt.monthly_target * (
          CASE
            WHEN date_trunc('month', per.start_date)::date = date_trunc('month', per.end_date)::date THEN
              per.days / EXTRACT(day FROM (date_trunc('month', per.start_date)::date + interval '1 month - 1 day'))::numeric
            ELSE
              EXTRACT(year FROM age(date_trunc('month', per.end_date), date_trunc('month', per.start_date))) * 12
              + EXTRACT(month FROM age(date_trunc('month', per.end_date), date_trunc('month', per.start_date)))
              + 1
          END
        )
      END
    )::numeric, 2) AS target_per_user
  FROM checklists_position p
  JOIN checklists_metrictype mt ON mt.position_id = p.id OR mt.position_id IS NULL
  LEFT JOIN checklists_tasktemplate tt ON tt.id = mt.activity_id
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE p.active = TRUE
    AND mt.active = TRUE
    AND p.id::text LIKE '$position'
),
records_by_metric AS (
  SELECT
    mr.position_id,
    mr.metric_id,
    SUM(mr.value)::numeric AS value
  FROM checklists_metricrecord mr
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE mr.date BETWEEN per.start_date AND per.end_date
  GROUP BY mr.position_id, mr.metric_id
),
profiles AS (
  SELECT
    up.position_id,
    up.user_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(up.display_name, ''), au.username) AS user_name
  FROM checklists_userprofile up
  JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR'
    AND up.active = TRUE
    AND au.is_active = TRUE
    AND up.position_id::text LIKE '$position'
    AND up.user_id::text LIKE '$user'
),
records_by_user AS (
  SELECT
    mr.position_id,
    mr.metric_id,
    mr.created_by_id AS user_id,
    SUM(mr.value)::numeric AS value
  FROM checklists_metricrecord mr
  CROSS JOIN period per
  WHERE mr.date BETWEEN per.start_date AND per.end_date
    AND COALESCE(mr.created_by_id::text, '') LIKE '$user'
  GROUP BY mr.position_id, mr.metric_id, mr.created_by_id
)SELECT
  ms.position_name AS "Tipo/cargo",
  pr.user_name AS "Usuário",
  ms.area AS "Área",
  ms.metric_name AS "Indicador",
  ms.activity_title AS "Atividade",
  ROUND(COALESCE(rbu.value, 0)::numeric, 2) AS "Realizado",
  ROUND(ms.target_per_user::numeric, 2) AS "Meta",
  ms.unit AS "Unidade",
  ROUND((
    CASE
      WHEN ms.target_per_user > 0 THEN COALESCE(rbu.value, 0) / ms.target_per_user * 100
      ELSE NULL
    END
  )::numeric, 1) AS "% atingimento"
FROM metric_scope ms
JOIN profiles pr ON pr.position_id = ms.position_id
LEFT JOIN records_by_user rbu ON rbu.position_id = ms.position_id AND rbu.metric_id = ms.metric_id AND rbu.user_id = pr.user_id
ORDER BY ms.position_name, pr.user_name, ms.area, ms.metric_name;

list.definition: SELECT '%' AS __value, 'Todos os tipos/cargos' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT id::text AS __value, name AS __text FROM checklists_position WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY __text
list.label: Tipo/cargo
list.name: position
list.query: SELECT '%' AS __value, 'Todos os tipos/cargos' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT id::text AS __value, name AS __text FROM checklists_position WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY __text

list.definition: SELECT '%' AS __value, 'Todos os usuários' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT au.id::text AS __value, COALESCE(NULLIF(up.display_name, ''), au.username) AS __text FROM checklists_userprofile up JOIN auth_user au ON au.id = up.user_id WHERE up.system_role = 'OPERATOR' AND up.active = TRUE AND au.is_active = TRUE AND up.position_id::text LIKE '$position' ORDER BY __text
list.label: Usuário
list.name: user
